questionHtml: Show that the angular velocity of the flywheel at t = 5.00 s is 200 rad s–1.
markschemeHtml:
use of L = lω = area under graph = 1.80 «kg m2 s–1» ✔

rearranges «to give ω= area/I»  1.80 = 0.5 × 5.00 × 0.0602 × ω ✔

«to get ω = 200 rad s–1 »

meta.title: Show that the angular velocity of the flywheel at t = 5.00 s is 200 rad s–1.
breadcrumbLabels: B.1 – Rigid bodies and rotational dynamics
